operations.name: TADD
operations.summary: Elementwise add of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TADD(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TSUB
operations.display_title: TSUB - Subtract one tile from another
operations.summary: Elementwise subtract of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TSUB(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TMUL
operations.summary: Elementwise multiply of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TMUL(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TMAX
operations.display_title: TMAX - Take the maximum of two tiles
operations.summary: Elementwise maximum of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TMAX(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TMIN
operations.display_title: TMIN - Take the minimum of two tiles
operations.summary: Elementwise minimum of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TMIN(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TAND
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise AND of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:

PTO_INST void TAND(TileData &dst, TileData &src0, TileData &src1);

operations.name: TOR
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise OR of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData>
PTO_INST void TOR(TileData &dst, TileData &src0, TileData &src1);

operations.name: TXOR
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise XOR of two tiles.

inputs.description: src1 tile; PTOAS form also declares tmp tile

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TXOR(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TSHL
operations.display_title: TSHL - Shift a tile left by per-element counts
operations.summary: Elementwise shift-left of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TSHL(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TSHR
operations.display_title: TSHR - Shift a tile right by per-element counts
operations.summary: Elementwise shift-right of two tiles.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TSHR(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCMP
operations.display_title: TCMP - Compare two tiles into a predicate mask
operations.summary: Compare two tiles and write a packed predicate mask.
cxx_signatures:

PTO_INST void TCMP(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, TileDataSrc &src1, CmpMode cmpMode);

PTO_INST void TSEL(TileData &dst, MaskTile &selMask, TileData &src0, TileData &src1, TmpTile &tmp);

PTO_INST void TABS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TNOT

PTO_INST void TNOT(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TNEG

PTO_INST void TNEG(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TRELU

PTO_INST void TRELU(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

PTO_INST void TDIV(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

PTO_INST void TLOG(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TRECIP

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TRECIP(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TEXP

operations.summary: Elementwise exponential.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TEXP(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TRSQRT
operations.display_title: TRSQRT - Compute reciprocal square root of a tile
operations.summary: Elementwise reciprocal square root.

operations.name: TADDS
operations.display_title: TADDS - Add a scalar to a tile
operations.summary: Elementwise add a scalar to a tile.

PTO_INST void TADDS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TAXPY(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.name: TSUBS
operations.display_title: TSUBS - Subtract a scalar from a tile
operations.summary: Elementwise subtract a scalar from a tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TSUBS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.name: TMULS
operations.display_title: TMULS - Multiply a tile by a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise multiply a tile by a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TMULS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.name: TDIVS
operations.display_title: TDIVS - Divide with a tile and a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise division with a scalar (tile/scalar or scalar/tile).

operations.name: TMINS
operations.display_title: TMINS - Take the minimum of a tile and a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise minimum of a tile and a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TMINS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.summary: Elementwise max of a tile and a scalar: `max(src, scalar)`.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TMAXS(TileDataDst& dst, TileDataSrc& src, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.name: TREMS
operations.display_title: TREMS - Compute the remainder of a tile and a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise remainder with a scalar: `remainder(src, scalar)`.

inputs.description: scalar value; PTOAS form also declares tmp tile

operations.name: TANDS
operations.display_title: TANDS - Bitwise-AND a tile with a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise AND of a tile and a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TANDS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, typename TileDataDst::DType scalar);

operations.name: TORS
operations.display_title: TORS - Bitwise-OR a tile with a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise OR of a tile and a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TORS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, typename TileDataDst::DType scalar);

operations.name: TXORS
operations.display_title: TXORS - Bitwise-XOR a tile with a scalar
operations.summary: Elementwise bitwise XOR of a tile and a scalar.

inputs.description: scalar value; PTOAS form also declares tmp tile

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TXORS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src0, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.display_title: TCMPS - Compare a tile with a scalar into a predicate mask
operations.summary: Compare a tile against a scalar and write per-element comparison results.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename T>
PTO_INST void TCMPS(TileDataDst& dst, TileDataSrc0& src0, T src1, CmpMode cmpMode);

operations.display_title: TSELS - Select between a tile and a scalar with a predicate mask
operations.summary: Select between source tile and scalar using a mask tile (per-element selection for source tile).
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataMask, typename TileDataSrc, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TSELS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataMask &mask, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataTmp &tmp, typename TileDataSrc::DType scalar);

operations.name: TSHLS
operations.display_title: TSHLS - Shift a tile left by a scalar count
operations.summary: Elementwise shift-left a tile by a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TSHLS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, typename TileDataDst::DType scalar);

operations.name: TSHRS
operations.display_title: TSHRS - Shift a tile right by a scalar count
operations.summary: Elementwise shift-right a tile by a scalar.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TSHRS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, typename TileDataDst::DType scalar);

operations.name: TROWSUM
operations.summary: Reduce each row by summing across columns.

outputs.description: dst 1D tile, one value per row

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWSUM(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TROWPROD
operations.summary: Reduce each row by multiplying across columns.

outputs.description: dst column/vector tile, one value per row

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWPROD(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TROWMAX
operations.summary: Reduce each row by taking the maximum across columns.

outputs.description: dst column/vector tile, one value per row

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWMAX(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TROWMIN
operations.summary: Reduce each row by taking the minimum across columns.

outputs.description: dst column/vector tile, one value per row

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWMIN(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TROWARGMAX
operations.summary: Get the column index of the maximum element for each row.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWARGMAX(TileDataOut& dst, TileDataIn& src, TileDataTmp& tmp);

operations.name: TROWARGMIN
operations.summary: Get the column index of the minimum element for each row.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TROWARGMIN(TileDataOut& dst, TileDataIn& src, TileDataTmp& tmp);

operations.name: TCOLSUM
operations.summary: Reduce each column by summing across rows.

outputs.description: dst row/vector tile, one value per column

operations.name: TCOLPROD
operations.summary: Reduce each column by multiplying across rows.

outputs.description: dst row/vector tile, one value per column

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn>
PTO_INST void TCOLPROD(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src);

operations.name: TCOLMAX
operations.summary: Reduce each column by taking the maximum across rows.

outputs.description: dst row/vector tile, one value per column

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn>
PTO_INST void TCOLMAX(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src);

operations.name: TCOLMIN
operations.summary: Reduce each column by taking the minimum across rows.

outputs.description: dst row/vector tile, one value per column

cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn>
PTO_INST void TCOLMIN(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src);

operations.name: TCOLARGMAX
operations.summary: Get the row index of the maximum element for each column.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TCOLARGMAX(TileDataOut& dst, TileDataIn& src, TileDataTmp& tmp);

operations.name: TCOLARGMIN
operations.summary: Get the row index of the minimum element for each column.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TCOLARGMIN(TileDataOut& dst, TileDataIn& src, TileDataTmp& tmp);

operations.name: TROWEXPAND
operations.summary: Broadcast the first element of each source row across the destination row.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TROWEXPAND(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TROWEXPANDADD
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast add: add a per-row scalar vector.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDSUB
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast subtract: subtract a per-row scalar vector `src1` from each row of `src0`.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDMUL
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast multiply: multiply each row of `src0` by a per-row scalar vector `src1`.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDDIV
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast divide: divide each row of `src0` by a per-row scalar vector `src1`.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDMAX
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast max with a per-row scalar vector.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDMIN
operations.summary: Row-wise broadcast min with a per-row scalar vector.

operations.name: TROWEXPANDEXPDIF
operations.summary: Row-wise exp-diff: compute exp(src0 - src1) with per-row scalars.

operations.name: TCOLEXPAND
operations.summary: Broadcast the first element of each source column across the destination column.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPAND(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDADD
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast add with per-column scalar vector.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDADD(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDSUB
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast subtract: subtract a per-column scalar vector from each column.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDSUB(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDMUL
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast multiply: multiply each column by a per-column scalar vector.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDMUL(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDDIV
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast divide: divide each column by a per-column scalar vector.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDDIV(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDMAX
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast max with per-column scalar vector.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDMAX(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDMIN
operations.summary: Column-wise broadcast min with per-column scalar vector.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDMIN(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TCOLEXPANDEXPDIF
operations.summary: Column-wise exp-diff: compute exp(src0 - src1) with per-column scalars.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc0, typename TileDataSrc1>
PTO_INST void TCOLEXPANDEXPDIF(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc0 &src0, TileDataSrc1 &src1);

operations.name: TMATMUL
operations.summary: Matrix multiply (GEMM) producing an accumulator/output tile.
data_types: ACC S32 = S8xS8; ACC F32 = F16/BF16/F32 and selected FP8 pairs

operations.name: TMATMUL_BIAS
operations.summary: Matrix multiply with bias add.

inputs.description: optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: Same as TMATMUL; bias dtype matches ACC/result dtype

operations.name: TMATMUL_ACC
operations.summary: Matrix multiply with accumulator input (fused accumulate).

inputs.description: optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: Same as TMATMUL; input/output ACC dtype follows CUBE profile

operations.name: TMATMUL_MX
operations.summary: Matrix multiply (GEMM) with additional scaling tiles for mixed-precision / quantized matmul on supported targets.

inputs.description: A scale tile + B/rhs tile + B scale tile
optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: MX profile-defined: source F16/BF16/F32 or FP8/FP4; scale/bias/ACC follow MX profile

operations.name: TGEMV
operations.summary: General Matrix-Vector multiplication producing an accumulator/output tile.
data_types: ACC S32 = S8xS8; ACC F32 = F16/BF16/F32 and selected FP8 pairs
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileRes, typename TileLeft, typename TileRight>
PTO_INST void TGEMV(TileRes &cMatrix, TileLeft &aMatrix, TileRight &bMatrix);

operations.name: TGEMV_BIAS
operations.summary: GEMV with bias add.

inputs.description: optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: Same as TGEMV; bias dtype matches ACC/result dtype

operations.name: TGEMV_ACC
operations.summary: GEMV with explicit accumulator input/output tiles.

inputs.description: optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: Same as TGEMV; input/output ACC dtype follows CUBE profile

operations.name: TGEMV_MX
operations.summary: GEMV with additional scaling tiles for mixed-precision / quantized matrix-vector compute.

inputs.description: A scale tile + B/rhs tile + B scale tile
optional ExtraTile (input ACC/bias/scale per opcode profile)

data_types: MX profile-defined: source F16/BF16/F32 or FP8/FP4; scale/bias/ACC follow MX profile

operations.name: TLOAD
operations.display_title: TLOAD: Load a global tensor view into a tile
operations.summary: Load data from a GlobalTensor (GM) into a Tile.

inputs.description: base, stride, pad mode/value, init attrs

operations.name: TSTORE
operations.display_title: TSTORE: Store a tile into a global tensor view
operations.summary: Store data from a Tile into a GlobalTensor (GM), optionally using atomic write or quantization parameters.

operations.name: TPREFETCH
operations.display_title: TPREFETCH: Hint a future global-to-tile load
operations.summary: Prefetch data from global memory into a tile-local cache/buffer (hint).
data_types: Same element dtype set as TLOAD profile; src/dst element size must match
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData, typename GlobalData>
PTO_INST void TPREFETCH(TileData &dst, GlobalData &src);

operations.name: MGATHER
operations.display_title: MGATHER: Gather global memory elements into a tile
operations.summary: Gather-load elements from global memory into a tile using per-element indices.

operations.name: MSCATTER
operations.display_title: MSCATTER: Scatter tile elements into global memory
operations.summary: Scatter-store elements from a tile into global memory using per-element indices.

operations.name: TEXPANDS
operations.display_title: TEXPANDS: Broadcast a scalar into a tile
operations.summary: Broadcast a scalar into a destination tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData>
PTO_INST void TEXPANDS(TileData &dst, typename TileData::DType scalar);

operations.name: TCI
operations.display_title: TCI: Create a contiguous index tile
operations.summary: Generate a contiguous integer sequence into a destination tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData, typename T, int descending>
PTO_INST void TCI(TileData &dst, T start);

operations.name: TTRI
operations.display_title: TTRI: Build a triangular mask tile
operations.summary: Generate a triangular (lower/upper) mask tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData, int isUpperOrLower>
PTO_INST void TTRI(TileData &dst, int diagonal);

operations.name: TFILLPAD
operations.summary: Copy+pad a tile outside the valid region with a compile-time pad value.

operations.name: TCVT
operations.summary: Elementwise type conversion with a specified rounding mode.
data_types: FP8/FP4/e8m0; exact pair depends on RoundMode/SaturationMode

operations.name: TQUANT
operations.summary: Quantize a tile (e.g. FP32 to FP8) producing exponent/scaling/max outputs.

inputs.description: optional offset/scaling/index tile per quant profile

data_types: INT8: F32 -> S8/U8; MXFP8: F32/BF16/F16 -> FP8(e4m3); MXFP4: BF16/F16 -> FP4(e2m1x2)
cxx_signatures:
template <auto quant_type, typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataSrc,
          typename TileDataExp, typename TileDataMax>
PTO_INST void TQUANT(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataExp *exp,
                     TileDataMax *max, TileDataSrc *scaling);

template <auto quant_type, auto store_mode, typename TileDataOut,
          typename TileDataSrc, typename TileDataExp, typename TileDataMax,
          typename TileDataIdx>
PTO_INST void TQUANT(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataExp *exp,
                     TileDataMax *max, TileDataSrc *scaling,
                     TileDataExp *exp_zz, TileDataIdx *vgather_idx);

template <auto quant_type, typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataSrc,
          typename TileDataPara>
PTO_INST void TQUANT(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataPara &scale,
                     TileDataPara *offset = nullptr);

operations.name: TDEQUANT
operations.summary: Dequantize an integer tile into a floating-point tile using scale and offset tiles.
data_types: src: S8 or S16; dst/scale/offset: F32

operations.name: TEXTRACT
operations.summary: Extract a sub-tile from a source tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData>
PTO_INST void TEXTRACT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                       uint16_t indexRow = 0, uint16_t indexCol = 0);

template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData, ReluPreMode reluMode>
PTO_INST void TEXTRACT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                       uint16_t indexRow, uint16_t indexCol);

template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData,
          ReluPreMode reluMode = ReluPreMode::NoRelu>
PTO_INST void TEXTRACT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                       uint64_t preQuantScalar,
                       uint16_t indexRow, uint16_t indexCol);

operations.name: TINSERT
operations.summary: Insert a sub-tile into a destination tile at an (indexRow, indexCol) offset.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData>
PTO_INST void TINSERT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                      uint16_t indexRow, uint16_t indexCol);

template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData, ReluPreMode reluMode>
PTO_INST void TINSERT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                      uint16_t indexRow, uint16_t indexCol);

template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData,
          ReluPreMode reluMode = ReluPreMode::NoRelu>
PTO_INST void TINSERT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                      uint64_t preQuantScalar,
                      uint16_t indexRow, uint16_t indexCol);

template <TInsertMode mode, typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData>
PTO_INST void TINSERT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src,
                      uint32_t indexRow = 0, uint32_t indexCol = 0);

operations.name: TGATHER
operations.display_title: TGATHER: Gather elements within a tile
operations.summary: Gather/select elements using either an index tile or a compile-time mask pattern.

operations.name: TSCATTER
operations.display_title: TSCATTER: Scatter elements within a tile
operations.summary: Scatter rows of a source tile into a destination tile using per-element row indices.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataD, typename TileDataS, typename TileDataI>
PTO_INST void TSCATTER(TileDataD &dst, TileDataS &src, TileDataI &indexes);

operations.name: TCONCAT
operations.summary: Concatenate two source tiles along the column dimension into a destination tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTileData, typename Src0TileData, typename Src1TileData>
PTO_INST void TCONCAT(DstTileData &dst, Src0TileData &src0, Src1TileData &src1);

operations.name: TTRANS
operations.summary: Transpose with an implementation-defined temporary tile.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc, typename TileDataTmp>
PTO_INST void TTRANS(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataTmp &tmp);

operations.name: TIMG2COL
operations.display_title: TIMG2COL: Materialize image windows as columns
operations.summary: Image-to-column transform for convolution-like workloads.

operations.name: TMOV
operations.display_title: TMOV: Move data between tile registers
operations.summary: Move/copy between tiles, optionally applying implementation-defined conversion modes.

operations.name: TGATHERB
operations.display_title: TGATHERB: Gather tile elements by offsets
operations.summary: Gather elements using byte offsets.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataDst, typename TileDataSrc, typename TileDataOffset>
PTO_INST void TGATHERB(TileDataDst &dst, TileDataSrc &src, TileDataOffset &offset);

operations.name: TDEINTERLEAVE
operations.summary: De-interleave one or two source tiles into an even-position destination and an odd-position destination. This is the inverse of TINTERLEAVE.
data_types: int8}; all tiles same DType; row-major; validCols even

operations.name: TINTERLEAVE
operations.display_title: TINTERLEAVE: Pack two tiles into interleaved columns
operations.summary: Interleave even and odd source sequences into two destination tiles. This is the inverse of TDEINTERLEAVE.
data_types: src0/src1/dst0/dst1 same DType; row-major; validCols even

operations.name: TRESHAPE
operations.display_title: TRESHAPE: Reinterpret tile shape with equal storage size
operations.summary: Reinterpret a tile as another tile type/shape while preserving the underlying bytes.
data_types: bitwise reinterpret (any dtype): sizeof(InElem)·InNumel == sizeof(OutElem)·OutNumel; Loc must match; no NoneBox<->boxed
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileDataOut, typename TileDataIn>
PTO_INST void TRESHAPE(TileDataOut &dst, TileDataIn &src);

operations.name: TSORT
operations.display_title: TSORT: Sort tile values with indexes
operations.summary: Sort each 32-element block of src together with the corresponding indices from idx, and write the sorted value-index pairs into dst.

operations.name: TMRGSORT
operations.summary: Merge sort for multiple sorted lists (implementation-defined element format and layout).
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTileData, typename TmpTileData, typename Src0TileData,
          typename Src1TileData, typename Src2TileData, typename Src3TileData>
PTO_INST void TMRGSORT(DstTileData &dst,
                       MrgSortExecutedNumList &executedNumList,
                       TmpTileData &tmp, Src0TileData &src0,
                       Src1TileData &src1, Src2TileData &src2,
                       Src3TileData &src3);

template <typename DstTileData, typename TmpTileData, typename Src0TileData,
          typename Src1TileData, typename Src2TileData>
PTO_INST void TMRGSORT(DstTileData &dst,
                       MrgSortExecutedNumList &executedNumList,
                       TmpTileData &tmp, Src0TileData &src0,
                       Src1TileData &src1, Src2TileData &src2);

template <typename DstTileData, typename TmpTileData, typename Src0TileData,
          typename Src1TileData, bool exhausted>
PTO_INST void TMRGSORT(DstTileData &dst,
                       MrgSortExecutedNumList &executedNumList,
                       TmpTileData &tmp, Src0TileData &src0,
                       Src1TileData &src1);

template <typename DstTileData, typename SrcTileData>
PTO_INST void TMRGSORT(DstTileData &dst, SrcTileData &src, uint32_t blockLen);

operations.name: THISTOGRAM
operations.summary: Accumulate histogram bin counts from source values using an index tile.

operations.name: TPARTADD
operations.summary: Partial elementwise add with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

operations.name: TPARTMUL
operations.summary: Partial elementwise multiply with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

operations.name: TPARTMAX
operations.summary: Partial elementwise max with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

operations.name: TPARTMIN
operations.summary: Partial elementwise min with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

operations.name: TPARTARGMAX
operations.display_title: TPARTARGMAX: Select partial maxima and indexes
operations.summary: Select the maximum values and their indices across two partial tile inputs.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTile, typename SrcTile, typename DstIndexTile,
          typename SrcIndexTile>
PTO_INST void TPARTARGMAX(DstTile &values, SrcTile &lhs, SrcTile &rhs,
                          DstIndexTile &indices, SrcIndexTile &lhs_indices,
                          SrcIndexTile &rhs_indices);

operations.name: TPARTARGMIN
operations.display_title: TPARTARGMIN: Select partial minima and indexes
operations.summary: Select the minimum values and their indices across two partial tile inputs.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename DstTile, typename SrcTile, typename DstIndexTile,
          typename SrcIndexTile>
PTO_INST void TPARTARGMIN(DstTile &values, SrcTile &lhs, SrcTile &rhs,
                          DstIndexTile &indices, SrcIndexTile &lhs_indices,
                          SrcIndexTile &rhs_indices);

operations.name: TPUSH
operations.display_title: TPUSH: Push a tile into a pipe
operations.summary: Push a tile into a pipe or FIFO producer endpoint.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename Pipe, typename TileData>
PTO_INST void TPUSH(Pipe &pipe, TileData &src);

operations.name: TPOP
operations.display_title: TPOP: Pop a tile from a pipe
operations.summary: Pop a tile from a pipe or FIFO consumer endpoint.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename TileData, typename Pipe>
PTO_INST void TPOP(TileData &dst, Pipe &pipe);

operations.name: TALLOC
operations.display_title: TALLOC: Bind a pipe to global tensor storage
operations.summary: Associate a pipeline object with a global-tensor resource for the lifetime managed by the corresponding TFREE operation.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename Pipe, typename GlobalData>
PTO_INST void TALLOC(Pipe &pipe, GlobalData &global_tensor);

operations.name: TFREE
operations.summary: Release the currently held pipe or FIFO slot back to the producer.
cxx_signatures:
template <typename Pipe>
PTO_INST void TFREE(Pipe &pipe);
